column11: Message
enquiry.visitor.activated
room.pci-disclaimer
room.join
Hi! This is Tom. Is there anything I can help you with?
Hey i'm Garcia, my questions are how long does it take to get verified? and also once I get verified am i gonna get access to the Hong Kong mobile number right away?
Have you already purchased a number online?
I see this
But I haven purchased anything yet
We will check with related team and give you a respond
Ok thank you i really need to get the number urgently
How do you see?
Have forwarded the request to related team, they will check on their working hours
Thanks how long until I get verified?
Will give you an update once got respond
Ok
you got any response?
I really in need right now
Hey your colleague reached out to me via email that I need to supplement another proof of address, can you check it please? I responded to him
Noted, will forward the request to them.
Thank you very much!
Appreciate your support
You're welcome.
Do you think it I will get a response soon?
You should receive a payment link in your email.
After top up, you can use the number.
I made the payment
Now am I able to receive SMS too?
I need to receive a SMS through this number, will I be able to receive it and will it be forwarded to this number: +36205998830?
Let me check with our team
thanks let me know
So what do you know?
I need to get a verification code to this number
We have informed related team about the settings. Will give you an update once got respond. Sorry for the inconvenience caused.
I tried it in the meantime but I have not received the SMS code
Should only be fine for phone calls. Need extra setting for SMS services.
Ok, Yes I really need SMS too please help me with that
Any news?
I need to get it asap really I would really appreciate your help with this
No update so far. Will give you an update once got respond.
I'm really worried that it is not going to be done tdoay
Please try to push this case as much as you can! I would really appreciate it!!

We’re sorry that, as our departments are based in different countries, we can only leave a message with their team. Rest assured, we will do our best to follow up and expedite the matter. We apologize for any inconvenience caused.
Thank you! Can we solve it today?
This will depend on our colleague’s response. We’ll follow up and update you as soon as possible.
Ok, please update me as soon as you can! thank you very much!
Do you have any updates?
unfortunately, no repsond so far
Can I do something about the settings to receive the SMS?
room.join
Sorry, the setting should be done on our colleague's side.
Why is it taking so much time?
I need it very urgently
We will update you on Monday
The number 85257451704 is ready to use.  We have coducted some test message and normal.
room.leave
room.leave
enquiry.terminate
